mapper.select: SELECT tarr.*,toi.orgn_nm,thi.hr_id as orgnHeadId, thi.hr_nm as orgnHeadNm,aep.audit_nm as auditNm, case when taia.signature is not null then 'Y' when taiR.signature is not null then 'I' when taiw.signature is not null then 'W' else 'C' end as approvalStatus FROM esg.tb_audit_result_report tarr LEFT JOIN esg.tb_audit_execution_plan aep on tarr.doc_no = aep.doc_no and tarr.write_year = aep.write_year LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi on toi.orgn_id = tarr.orgn_id left join esg.tb_approval_info taiw on taiw.target_type = 'ARR' and taiw.target_id = tarr.write_year || tarr.doc_no || tarr.doc_seq and taiw.param = 'writer' left join esg.tb_approval_info tair on tair.target_type = 'ARR' and tair.target_id = tarr.write_year || tarr.doc_no || tarr.doc_seq and tair.param = 'reviewer' left join esg.tb_approval_info taia on taia.target_type = 'ARR' and taia.target_id = tarr.write_year || tarr.doc_no || tarr.doc_seq and taia.param = 'approver' left join esg.tb_hr_incharge_map thim on thim.target_type = 'orgn' and thim.target_id = tarr.orgn_id and thim.gubun = 'HEAD' left join esg.tb_hr_info thi on thi.hr_id = thim.hr_id WHERE tarr.write_year = #{writeYear} AND tarr.doc_no = #{docNo} AND tarr.doc_type = #{docType} AND tarr.doc_seq = #{docSeq} ORDER BY tarr.use_yn DESC, tarr.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_audit_result_report( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, audit_dt, audit_st_time, audit_ed_time, orgn_id, remark, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{docSeq}, #{auditDt}, #{auditStTime}, #{auditEdTime}, #{orgnId}, #{remark}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} );

select lpad((coalesce(max(substring(doc_seq_detail, 1, 5)::integer), 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') as docSeqDetail from esg.tb_audit_result_report_detail WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_seq = #{docSeq}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_audit_result_report_detail( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, doc_seq_detail, target_job, result, remark, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{docSeq}, #{docSeqDetail}, #{targetJob}, #{result}, #{remark}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} );

INSERT INTO esg.tb_audit_result_report_hr( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, hr_id, created_at, created_by ) VALUES( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{docSeq}, #{hrId}, now(), #{createdBy} );
